title: Better Experiences (+) Renewed
description: A vanilla+ modpack primarily aimed around increasing your progression, but also survival difficulty!
body:
## > This is not *a* modpack. This is ***the*** modpack!
## 

> Archived again because of the same old problem: Can't play properly, can't test properly, lack of motivation, especially due to potato PC

This modpack's optimization is based on the open source modpack "**Additive**".

# Big mods:

- Ad astra + lots of planets including star wars
- Create
- OPAC
- Xaero's
- Tech reborn
- AE2
- Plasmo Voice
- Cobblemon
- and many more

  Most big mods have many extensions.

<details>
<summary>Legacy description</summary>

> This is not *a* modpack. This is ***the*** modpack!

This Quilt modpack expands your survival and creative opportunities, as well as challenges.

> Note: Development paused, as my PC simply can't handle Minecraft anymore. You may fork this, WITH permission from me.
> For a lighter, maintained version, see: [Lite Experiences+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/lite-experiences/).

# Features:

<details>
<summary>Optimization</summary>

This pack includes top-quality performance mods, such as Sodium, Lithium, Iris, etc. This part of mods was heavily based on and inspired by the open-source [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized).

</details>

<details>
<summary>Progression</summary>

[LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz), most notably is included. You have to gather experience for more hearts, better speed, and even the ability to mine or use bows! 

{[EarlyStage](https://modrinth.com/mod/earlystage) coming soon}

</details>

<details>
<summary>Dimensions</summary>

Explore new planets with [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) or a devilishly difficult dimension with [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)!

Overhauled Nether and End!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Overhauled Experience</summary>

[Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) and [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) enhance the Nether and End, respectively.

[Yung's mods](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG) overhaul various aspects of overworld generation too!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Technology</summary>

[MI](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-industrialization), [AE2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2), and other technology mods allow you to automate your material gathering, and allow expansion in a wholly different direction.

{Create mod coming soon, I'm trying to get it to work.}

</details>

<details>
<summary>QOL</summary>

Many Quality of Life mods are here to make things easier for you (balanced by mods that make life difficult).

For instance, [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Survival</summary>

Fight against hot or cold weather, dehydration, thin, unbreathable air, or a blood moon!

Or how about camouflaging creepers!?!

</details>

## Check out the full list, as this description can't cover ***everything***!

Note: This is still in early development. If you find any bugs, or face issues or crashes, please do not hesitate to report!

This pack was tested, and screenshots captured,  using lower end CPU and integrated graphics.
If you have any better specs, please feel free to submit screenshots in GitHub! (I shall give credit to you as well!)


Check out the versions' dependencies, for a full mod list.

<details>
<summary>Heavily inspired by (& based on)</summary>

- Better Adventures + / ++
- Valhelsia packs
- Fabulously Optimized

</details>

<details>
<summary>Recommended, but can't include this one</summary>

[Physics mod pro](https://minecraftphysicsmod.com/pro)

</details>

</details>
